rows.notes: AU→US sunglasses — MFN 2% + IEEPA reciprocal 10% (no fentanyl surcharge). Re-baselined 2026-05-19 to include IEEPA in expectedDutyUsd per canary convention.
CN→US cotton t-shirt — full stack: MFN + Section 301 + IEEPA baseline + Fentanyl + Geneva. Tests every additional-duties layer.

MX→US leather handbag USMCA-qualifying: MFN exempt, IEEPA reciprocal 10% still applies (not in Annex II, not fentanyl). Audit C1 fix: previously $0 because engine wrongly stripped all additionals under FTA.
EU→GB cotton dress with TCA origin statement — duty-free + 20% UK VAT.
US→GB cotton t-shirt — no preference. MFN 12% + 20% VAT on (CIF + duty).
US→GB printed book — zero VAT and zero MFN. Tests HS-prefix VAT override (4901 → zero).
US→EU leather handbag — MFN 3% + 21% VAT. Under €150 → IOSS scheme applies for VAT collection at sale.
US→AU sunglasses A$300 — under A$1000 de-minimis → duty-free. 10% GST on full value collected at sale.
US→CA leather handbag with USMCA claim — duty-free + federal 5% GST.
EU→JP cotton dress with EU-Japan EPA origin statement — duty-free + 10% consumption tax.
CN→ID cotton t-shirt — over USD 3 de-minimis → MFN + PPN apply.
DE→US steel doors/frames — Section 232 50% applies; IEEPA reciprocal excluded under Annex II.
US→KR leather handbag with KORUS claim — duty-free + 10% VAT.
JP→NZ wrist watch with CPTPP claim — duty-free + 15% GST.
GB→US cotton sweater — MFN 16.5% + IEEPA reciprocal 10%, no FTA.
IT→US leather shoes — MFN 10% + IEEPA 10%.
FR→US perfume — MFN 0% (free entry) + IEEPA 10%.
CA→US gold jewellery USMCA-qualifying: MFN exempt, IEEPA reciprocal 10% applies (jewellery not in Annex II 7108 bullion-only). Audit C1 fix.
CA→US steel bars USMCA-qualifying: MFN exempt, Section 232 50% still applies (FTAs don't override Section 232 per 2025 Proclamation). Audit C1 regression-proof.
CN→EU cotton t-shirt — MFN 12% + 21% VAT.
JP→EU watch with EU-Japan EPA claim — duty-free + 21% VAT.
US→GB babies' garments — MFN 12% + zero-rated VAT. Tests HS-prefix VAT override on 6111.
US→IE babies' garments — MFN 12% + IE zero VAT on 6111 children's clothing.
US→IN pharma — MFN 10% + IGST 5% (HSN ch 30 tiered rate).
CN→IN cotton t-shirt under ₹1000 — MFN ~10% + IGST 5% (HSN ch 61 reduced).
US→GB whisky — UK alcohol duty ~50% effective ad-valorem + 20% VAT.
GB→AU wine — WET 29% (excise) + GST 10%. Under A$1000 = duty-free.
CN→US wooden bedroom furniture — MFN 0% + Section 301 25% + IEEPA 10% + fentanyl 20% + Geneva 20%. ADD case A-570-058 separately exposes 7-198% — flagged.
CN→ID cotton t-shirt under USD 3 → Indonesia de-minimis applies. Sanity check that low-threshold gating works.
US→TH perfume under USD 42 → Thailand de-minimis.
US→HK smartphone — Hong Kong is a free port (no MFN duty, no VAT).
US→CH gold jewellery — MFN 0% + 8.1% VAT (over de-minimis CHF 62).
US→KR sneakers under USD 200 KORUS de-minimis → duty + VAT free.
GB→US leather shoes with $50 freight + $25 insurance — proves duty applied on FOB ($1000), not CIF ($1075). Audit C3 regression-proof.
VN→US sneakers with textile uppers — MFN 20% (HTS 6404.11.20). Plus IEEPA reciprocal 10%. Verified against current HTS schedule.
CN→US headphones — MFN free but Section 301 list 4A applies (7.5%) + IEEPA reciprocal (10%). Section 301 rate is the volatile component.

CH→US automatic mechanical watch, gold case — compound rate (51¢ each + 6.25% on case + 5.3% on battery). Ad-valorem portion captured; specific component requires per-unit data. driftThreshold loosened to 10% to absorb specific-component variance.
IT→US ladies' leather handbag — MFN 8% (HTS 4202.21.60). Plus IEEPA reciprocal 10%.
DE→US construction-set toy — MFN free (HTS 9503.00.00). Plus IEEPA reciprocal 10%.
KR→US lipstick — KORUS FTA preferential 0% (MFN base would be free anyway). KORUS-origin claim required.
CN→US printed book — MFN free (HTS 4901.99) + excluded from IEEPA reciprocal under information-materials carve-out (50 USC 1702(b)(3)).
JP→US interchangeable camera lens — MFN 2% (HTS 9002.11). Plus IEEPA reciprocal 10%.

FR→US 750ml still wine bottle — specific rate $0.0566/L + federal excise. Drift threshold loosened (15%) because excise is volume-driven not value-driven; small value changes swing the implied % wildly.
AU→US wool sweater — MFN 16.3% (HTS 6110.11.00). AUSFTA preferential 0% available if originating + certified.
MX→US fresh avocados — USMCA preferential 0% (MFN base 11.2¢/kg). USMCA-origin claim via Certification of Origin.
IN→US silk-blend ladies' dress — MFN 6.9% (HTS 6204.49.50). India loses GSP preference (suspended 2019); standard MFN applies.
US→EU(DE) cotton T-shirt — TARIC MFN 12% + DE VAT 19% on duty-paid value. Under €150 IOSS may apply.
CN→EU(DE) phone accessory (data-transmission apparatus) — ITA 0% MFN. DE VAT 19% applies. Under €150 IOSS scheme applies.
GB→EU(DE) black tea — TCA preferential 0% if UK-origin + statement on origin attached. DE VAT 7% (reduced).
US→EU(DE) bourbon whiskey — MFN 0% (retaliatory tariff lifted 2024). DE VAT 19%; alcohol excise applies separately and is excluded from this canary.
CN→EU(DE) skincare cream — TARIC MFN 0% (HS 3304.99.00). DE VAT 19% applies. Under €150 IOSS scheme.
JP→EU(DE) digital camera body — EU-Japan EPA preferential 0% (industrial duty-free). DE VAT 19%.
VN→EU(DE) leather shoes — EVFTA staged elimination, ~1.5% in 2026 (year 6 of 7). Reaches 0% in 2027. drift threshold loosened to absorb annual reduction.
US→GB bourbon — UKGT 0% (retaliatory tariff lifted 2022). UK VAT 20%. Spirits duty excise applies separately and is excluded from this canary.
CN→GB laptop — UKGT 0% (ITA). UK VAT 20% on value.
EU→GB fresh cheese — TCA preferential 0% + UK VAT zero-rated on food (HS 0406 zero-rated).
AU→GB 750ml wine — UK-Australia FTA preferential 0% (in force 2023). UK VAT 20%. Spirits/wine duty excise excluded from canary.
IN→GB saffron — UKGT 0% + UK VAT zero-rated (food, HS 0910).
US→GB perfume — UKGT 0% + UK VAT 20%. Under £135 IOSS-style scheme applies.
CN→GB toys — UKGT 0% + UK VAT 20%.
DE→GB computer parts — TCA preferential 0% + ITA 0% MFN. UK VAT 20%.
US→CA cotton T-shirt — CUSMA preferential 0% (origin in US, NA TPL). Federal GST 5%. Provincial PST/HST varies by destination province (canary uses GST-only baseline).
CN→CA headphones — MFN 0% + GST 5%. Under CAD 20 personal-use de-minimis would waive (commercial does not).
EU→CA wine — CETA preferential 0% (in force 2017). GST 5%. Provincial liquor-board markup excluded from canary.
US→CA video camera — CUSMA preferential 0%. GST 5%.
IT→CA leather shoes — CETA staged elimination from MFN 18%. Rate phases out by 2027. drift threshold loosened to absorb annual reduction.
CN→CA toys — MFN 0% + GST 5%.
AU→CA skincare — CPTPP preferential 0%. GST 5%.
JP→CA quartz wristwatch — CPTPP preferential 0% + GST 5%.
CN→AU cotton T-shirt — MFN 5% + GST 10%. Under AUD 1000 duty waived (commercial threshold $1000); above duty applies. GST applies regardless of value since 2018.
US→AU skincare — AUSFTA preferential 0% + GST 10%.
JP→AU camera lens — JAEPA preferential 0% (also CPTPP). GST 10%.
CN→AU headphones — ChAFTA preferential 0% + GST 10%.
GB→AU leather handbag — AU-UK FTA preferential 0% + GST 10%.
IT→AU wine — MFN 5% + GST 10% + Wine Equalisation Tax 29% (WET excluded from canary; specific to alcohol). drift threshold loosened.
NZ→AU fresh cheese — ANZCERTA preferential 0% + GST-free (basic food).
IN→AU spice mix — MFN 0% + GST-free (basic food).
CN→AU toys — ChAFTA preferential 0% + GST 10%.
US→AT USB-C cable — TARIC ITA 0% + AT MWST 20%. EU IOSS €150 scheme applies under threshold.
US→BE USB-C cable — TARIC ITA 0% + BE VAT 21%.
US→BG USB-C cable — TARIC ITA 0% + BG VAT 20%.
US→HR USB-C cable — TARIC ITA 0% + HR PDV 25%.
US→CY USB-C cable — TARIC ITA 0% + CY VAT 19%.
US→CZ USB-C cable — TARIC ITA 0% + CZ VAT 21%.
US→DK USB-C cable — TARIC ITA 0% + DK VAT 25% (no reduced rates).
US→EE USB-C cable — TARIC ITA 0% + EE VAT 22% (raised from 20% in 2024).
US→FI USB-C cable — TARIC ITA 0% + FI VAT 25.5% (raised from 24% in Sep 2024).
US→FR USB-C cable — TARIC ITA 0% + FR TVA 20%.
US→DE USB-C cable — TARIC ITA 0% + DE MWST 19%.
US→GR USB-C cable — TARIC ITA 0% + GR VAT 24%.
US→HU USB-C cable — TARIC ITA 0% + HU VAT 27% (highest in EU).
US→IE USB-C cable — TARIC ITA 0% + IE VAT 23%.
US→IT USB-C cable — TARIC ITA 0% + IT IVA 22%.
US→LV USB-C cable — TARIC ITA 0% + LV VAT 21%.
US→LT USB-C cable — TARIC ITA 0% + LT VAT 21%.
US→LU USB-C cable — TARIC ITA 0% + LU VAT 17% (lowest in EU).
US→MT USB-C cable — TARIC ITA 0% + MT VAT 18%.
US→NL USB-C cable — TARIC ITA 0% + NL BTW 21%.
US→PL USB-C cable — TARIC ITA 0% + PL VAT 23%.
US→PT USB-C cable — TARIC ITA 0% + PT IVA 23%.
US→RO USB-C cable — TARIC ITA 0% + RO VAT 19%.
US→SK USB-C cable — TARIC ITA 0% + SK VAT 23% (raised from 20% Jan 2025).
US→SI USB-C cable — TARIC ITA 0% + SI DDV 22%.
US→ES USB-C cable — TARIC ITA 0% + ES IVA 21%.
US→SE USB-C cable — TARIC ITA 0% + SE VAT 25%.
CN→DE cotton tee — TARIC MFN 12% + DE VAT 19% on duty-paid value.
JP→DE telecoms equipment — EU-Japan EPA 0% + ITA 0% MFN + DE VAT 19%.
CN→FR cotton tee — TARIC MFN 12% + FR TVA 20%.
US→FR skincare — TARIC MFN 0% + FR TVA 20%.
CN→IT cotton tee — TARIC MFN 12% + IT IVA 22%.
VN→IT leather shoes — EVFTA year-6 ~1.5% + IT IVA 22%. drift threshold loosened for staged elimination.
CN→ES cotton tee — TARIC MFN 12% + ES IVA 21%.
CN→NL cotton tee — TARIC MFN 12% + NL BTW 21%.
US→JP leather handbag — Japan MFN ~10% (no FTA with US) + 10% consumption tax.
CN→JP headphones — ITA 0% MFN + 10% consumption tax. RCEP also 0% (redundant).
AU→JP wine — JAEPA preferential 0% MFN + JP wine excise (~15% effective) + 10% consumption tax on (CIF + duty).
GB→JP Scotch whisky — UK-Japan CEPA preferential 0% + 10% consumption tax. Alcohol excise excluded.
KR→JP skincare — RCEP preferential 0% + 10% consumption tax.
VN→JP leather shoes — CPTPP preferential 0% + 10% consumption tax.
CN→JP toys — MFN 0% + 10% consumption tax.
US→JP printed book — MFN 0% + 8% reduced consumption tax (books + newspapers + groceries use reduced rate).
FR→JP perfume — EU-Japan EPA preferential 0% + 10% consumption tax.
IT→JP leather handbag — EU-Japan EPA preferential 0% + 10% consumption tax.
US→JP digital camera body — MFN 0% + 10% consumption tax (no FTA with US).
AU→NZ skincare — ANZCERTA preferential 0% + NZ GST 15%.
US→NZ cotton tee — NZ MFN 10% + GST 15% on duty-paid value (no FTA with US).
CN→NZ headphones — NZ-China FTA preferential 0% (also ITA) + NZ GST 15%.
GB→NZ leather handbag — NZ-UK FTA preferential 0% (in force 2023) + NZ GST 15%.
EU→NZ wine — NZ-EU FTA preferential 0% (in force May 2024) + NZ GST 15%. Alcohol excise excluded.
VN→NZ leather shoes — CPTPP preferential 0% + NZ GST 15%.
US→NZ printed book — MFN 0% + NZ GST 15%. Unlike GB/IE, NZ does not zero-rate books.
CN→NZ toys — NZ-China FTA preferential 0% + NZ GST 15%.
KR→NZ camera lens — NZ-Korea FTA preferential 0% (bilateral, in force 2015) + NZ GST 15%.
TH→NZ jasmine rice — AANZFTA preferential 0% + NZ GST 15%. NZ does not GST-free food.
US→SG cotton tee — US-Singapore FTA preferential 0% + SG GST 9% (raised Jan 2024 — aligned with vat-rates seed).
CN→SG headphones — SG MFN 0% (free trade port) + SG GST 9%.
JP→SG digital camera — Japan-Singapore EPA preferential 0% + SG GST 9%.
EU→SG skincare — EU-Singapore FTA preferential 0% + SG GST 9%.
GB→SG Scotch whisky — UK-Singapore FTA preferential 0% ad-valorem + SG GST 9%. SG volume-based excise (~SGD 88/L of alcohol) excluded from canary; drift threshold loosened.
AU→SG wine — Singapore-Australia FTA preferential 0% ad-valorem + SG GST 9%. Wine excise excluded; drift threshold loosened.
US→SG printed book — SG MFN 0% + SG GST 9%.
CN→SG toys — SG MFN 0% + SG GST 9%.
IN→SG silk-blend ladies' dress — India-Singapore CECA preferential 0% + SG GST 9%.
KR→SG K-beauty skincare — Korea-Singapore FTA preferential 0% + SG GST 9%.
US→HK cotton tee — HK free port, MFN 0%; no VAT/GST.
CN→HK headphones — HK free port; CEPA preferential redundant. No VAT.
JP→HK digital camera — HK free port, MFN 0%. No VAT.
FR→HK perfume — HK free port. No VAT.
GB→HK Scotch whisky — HK dutiable alcohol (≥30% ABV) at specific rate HKD 100/L pure alcohol. Drift threshold loosened — specific-component variance.
US→HK wine — HK duty-free since 2008 (wine < 30% ABV is exempt).
US→HK cigars — HK dutiable tobacco HKD 3,400/kg specific. 200g box ≈ HKD 680. Drift threshold loosened — weight-dependent.
CN→HK printed book — HK free port. No VAT.
AU→HK skincare — HK free port. No VAT.
IT→HK leather handbag — HK free port. No VAT.
US→CH cotton tee — CH SPECIFIC tariff (CHF/100kg); ad-valorem-equivalent ~6%. CH MWST 8.1%. Drift threshold loosened — specific-rate math.
EU→CH fresh cheese — CH-EU bilateral agriculture protocol duty-free + reduced VAT 2.6% (food).
US→CH skincare — CH MFN 0% + CH MWST 8.1%.
CN→CH headphones — ITA 0% + CH MWST 8.1%.
US→CH printed book — MFN 0% + CH MWST 2.6% reduced (books / newspapers).
JP→CH camera — Japan-Switzerland EPA preferential 0% + CH MWST 8.1%.
GB→CH leather handbag — UK-Switzerland FTA (continuity) preferential 0% + CH MWST 8.1%.
DE→CH diesel/heating oil — CH-EU bilateral 0% MFN + 8.1% MWST. Carbon levy CHF 132/t CO₂ excluded (paid at depot, not import).
IT→CH sporting shotgun — CH-EU bilateral 0% MFN + 8.1% MWST. WBV (Weapons Act) authorisation required for import; not part of duty stack.
US→NZ packaged pharma — NZ MFN 0% + NZ GST 15%.
AU→NZ wine — ANZCERTA preferential 0% + NZ GST 15%. Wine excise excluded.
EU→NZ fresh cheese — NZ-EU FTA preferential 0% (in force May 2024) + NZ GST 15%.
